The residence

Fleur

A second-floor one-bedroom apartment in the village heart of Green Coast, Palasë — the most accessible entry to the resort's stone quarter. An efficient, light plan above the central plaza, with the promenades, pools and Blue Flag beach below.

Location within the resort

Fleur · Zona G8, Green Coast Resort

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Fleur sits

Fleur sits at the centre of the village, directly above the parking entrance and a few steps west of the central plaza — hotel and its services are across the plaza, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Central, a few steps west of the plaza
